A '''raaptur''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] battlefield emplacement used to attack enemy [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] and spacecraft. Although it was partially organic, the raaptur was not a creature, as many [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] creatures ([[Fambaa/Legends|fambaa]], [[cerrabore]], [[lerraa]]) used by the Gungans on the battlefield were.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
